summary: Iteration 32 - Testing Advanced Quiz Subcategories Feature. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working - 3 tabs visible, Studio Avanzato tab shows 6 subcategories with 8 questions each, quiz starts correctly, X button navigates back to quiz list, quiz submission works.
critical_code_review_comments: Advanced subcategories API endpoints correctly implemented at /api/quiz/advanced-subcategories and /api/quiz/advanced-subcategory/{id}
6 themed subcategories with exactly 8 questions each as specified
Quiz submission correctly handles adv_ prefixed topics with authentication
X button (close icon) in quiz header correctly calls resetQuiz() to navigate back to quiz list
Frontend properly loads and displays all 3 tabs (Quiz Tematici, Quiz Classici, Studio Avanzato)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced quiz subcategories feature fully implemented and tested. 6 themed subcategories under 'Studio Avanzato' tab: Critica Testuale, Esegesi e Metodi, Lingue Bibliche, Teologia del NT, Teologia dell'AT, Storia e Padri - each with 8 questions. X button navigation works correctly. Quiz submission with authentication works.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/quiz/advanced-subcategories: PASSED - Returns 6 categories with 8 questions each
backend_api_tests.GET /api/quiz/advanced-subcategory/{id}: PASSED - Returns correct quiz data for all 6 subcategories
backend_api_tests.POST /api/quiz/submit (adv_ topics): PASSED - Authentication required and works correctly
backend_api_tests.Language support: PASSED - Works with it, en, es languages

frontend_ui_tests.3_tabs_visible: PASSED - Quiz Tematici, Quiz Classici, Studio Avanzato all visible
frontend_ui_tests.studio_avanzato_subcategories: PASSED - Shows 6 subcategories (Critica Testuale, Esegesi e Metodi, Lingue Bibliche, Teologia del NT, Teologia dell'AT, Storia e Padri)
frontend_ui_tests.each_subcategory_has_8_questions: PASSED - Banner shows '6 quiz - 48 domande', each shows '8 domande'
frontend_ui_tests.quiz_starts_correctly: PASSED - Question screen shows with 1/8 progress indicator
frontend_ui_tests.x_button_navigation: PASSED - Clicking X in quiz returns to quiz list with all 3 tabs visible
frontend_ui_tests.quiz_navigation: PASSED - Prev/Next chevron buttons visible, can navigate between questions
frontend_ui_tests.answer_selection: PASSED - Options A/B/C/D clickable, selected option highlighted
frontend_ui_tests.quiz_submission: PASSED - Submit button works (tested via API)
